allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Recurse -Path backend -Exclude venv | Where-Object { $_.PSIsContainer -eq $false } | ForEach-Object { $_.FullName.Replace\("D:\\Wed-dev\\xiangmulianxi\\Clinical Agentic RAG\\", ""\) })

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Path "D:\\Wed-dev\\xiangmulianxi\\Clinical Agentic RAG\\backend" -Directory | Where-Object { $_.Name -notin @\("venv", "chroma_db", "postgres_data", ".idea", "__pycache__"\) } | Select-Object Name; Get-ChildItem -Path "D:\\Wed-dev\\xiangmulianxi\\Clinical Agentic RAG\\backend\\api" -Recurse 2>$null | Select-Object FullName; Get-ChildItem -Path "D:\\Wed-dev\\xiangmulianxi\\Clinical Agentic RAG\\backend\\services" -Recurse 2>$null | Select-Object FullName)

PowerShell($body = '{"query": "患者男，58岁，高血压病史10年。近一周出现头晕、视物模糊，血压165/95mmHg。请问应如何调整治疗方案？"}'; $response = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8000/api/chat/agent" -Method POST -Body $body -ContentType "application/json" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 120; $response.Content)
